LightningComponentBundle.description: Rebuild viewer (P0): renders a published Spec_JSON__c through the final* pipeline — engine tokens, layout registry, pageFrame chrome.

property.name: formId
property.label: Form Id
property.description: Form to render (active published version). A ?c__formId= URL parameter overrides this.

property.name: versionId
property.label: Version Id (optional)
property.description: Render a specific version instead. A ?c__versionId= URL parameter overrides this.

property.name: formId
property.label: Form Id
property.description: Form to render (active published version). A ?c__formId= URL parameter overrides this.

property.name: versionId
property.label: Version Id (optional)
property.description: Render a specific version instead. A ?c__versionId= URL parameter overrides this.
